UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '& { $repo = git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null; if (-not $repo) { $repo = (Get-Location).Path }; $script = Join-Path $repo ''MyAgent/.agent-config/MyAgent/hooks/ensure_mcp_servers.ps1''; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { $script = Join-Path $repo ''.github/hooks/ensure_mcp_servers.ps1'' }; if (Test-Path $script) { & $script } else { Write-Error ''ensure_mcp_servers.ps1 not found''; exit 1 } }'
